name: destiny-of-the-republic-a-tale-of-madness-medicine-and-the-murder-of-a-president
description: Candice Millard's Destiny of the Republic — a medical history and political biography toolkit about President James Garfield's assassination: the delusional assassin Charles Guiteau, the medical malpractice by Dr. Bliss that killed Garfield, Alexander Graham Bell's failed attempt to save him with his metal detector invention, and the state of medicine in 1880s America.
